ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the paper (e.g., ResNet) */,
  "cited_reference_count" INTEGER /* Number of cited references in the paper */,
  "times_cited_all_databases" INTEGER /* Number of times the paper has been cited across all databases */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the paper was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Brief summary of the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Relevant keywords for the paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the paper was published */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the uploaded paper file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the uploaded paper file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number of the publication */,
  "eissn" TEXT /* Electronic International Standard Serial Number of the publication */,
  "publisher_address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_publications" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being cited */,
  "citing_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper that cited the paper */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-citation) */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_databases" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the paper */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the paper was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being analyzed (e.g., citation count, download count) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)
column_names: Number of cited references in the paper
